page_content:
Formerly: ZOOL609.

BIOL613 Recombinant DNA (3 Credits)

An advanced course presenting the tools and procedures of genetic engineering. Theory and practical applications of recombinant DNA techniques to understanding eukaryotic gene structure and expression. Prerequisite: BSCI330 or BSCI230; and BSCI222. Or permission of instructor required.

Credit Only Granted for. BIOL613 or ZOOL652.
